    • parent

      public BstarSquaredSimpleMax.SearchTreeNodeModified<P> parent()
      Description copied from class: GameTreeNode
      The GameTreeNode object of the GameTreeNode.parent() of this node. the node representing the game state previous to GameTreeNode.position.

      If this node is the root node of the tree, the GameTreeNode.parent will be null.

      Overrides:
      parent in class GameTreeNode<SearchTreeNode<BstarSquaredSimpleMax.L1Position<P extends IGamePosition<P>>>, BstarSquaredSimpleMax.L1Position<P extends IGamePosition<P>>>
      Returns:
      The parent GameTreeNode of this node.
